package_info:
Name: gpu-compute
Version: 0.3.1
Summary: GPU-accelerated computation library
Home-page: https://github.com/example/gpu-compute
License: Apache-2.0
Requires-Python: >=3.9
Requires-Dist: nvidia-cuda-runtime-cu12
analysis: Package with CUDA dependency (nvidia-cuda-runtime-cu12). Contains C extensions that link against CUDA libraries. Build requires CUDA toolkit headers. Should be added to both CPU and CUDA variants as the build output differs across stacks.
failure_summary: Initial build failed: nvcc not found. CUDA toolkit headers required for compilation.
jira_context: Onboard gpu-compute 0.3.1 to the builder. Package requires CUDA for GPU kernels.
